# LiveTVServices.com Global IPTV Platform

Premium, high-performance global IPTV subscription marketing platform. Highly optimized for global distribution, multi-device setups, and low-latency streaming.

## 1. Core Service Parameters
- **Live Channels:** 18,000+ premium international channels.
- **On-Demand Content (VOD):** 80,000+ movies & TV show episodes.
- **Streaming Quality:** HD, Full HD, and 4K Ultra HD.
- **Server Stability:** 99.9% uptime with Anti-Freeze Stabilization technology.
- **Refund Policy:** 7-Day Money-Back Guarantee.

## 2. Subscription Pricing Packages
- **1 Month Premium:** $15 (1 active connection)
- **3 Months Premium:** $25 (1 active connection)
- **6 Months Premium:** $40 (1 active connection)
- **12 Months Premium:** $65 (1 active connection)

## 3. Official Support Channels
- **WhatsApp Support Number:** +447828932728
- **Official Support Email:** support@livetvservices.com
- **Help Center URL:** https://livetvservices.com/support

## 4. Supported Target Regions (programmatic SEO)
- **United States:** Optimized for Comcast, Spectrum, AT&T, Verizon networks.
- **United Kingdom:** Optimized for BT, Sky, Virgin Media, TalkTalk.
- **Canada:** Optimized for Rogers, Bell, Shaw, Telus. Payment via Interac e-Transfer supported.
- **Australia:** Optimized for NBN broadband, Telstra, Optus, TPG. Low-latency Oceania servers.
- **Saudi Arabia:** Optimized for STC, Mobily, Zain. Payment via Mada card and Apple Pay supported.
- **United Arab Emirates:** Optimized for Etisalat and du networks.

## 5. Supported Hardware Platforms
- **Amazon Fire Stick / Fire TV:** Side-loaded via Downloader app.
- **Smart TV:** Samsung Tizen, LG webOS, Sony Android TV, Google TV.
- **Android:** Smartphones, tablets, Nvidia Shield, Xiaomi TV Box.
- **Apple:** Apple TV, iPhone, iPad (via Smarters Player Lite or GSE Smart IPTV).
- **MAG Box:** MAG 250, 254, 322, 420, 520 portal URL configuration.
- **Web Browser:** Instantly play on Chrome, Safari, Edge, Firefox via Web Player.
